name: territory-developer
description: Unity project root scripts delegate to tools/mcp-ia-server (IA / JSON tooling). Run npm ci in tools/mcp-ia-server if npm run test:ia fails with missing modules. npm run validate:all chains IA checks (see project-implementation-validation skill).

scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:dead-project-specs && npm run test:ia && npm run validate:fixtures && npm run generate:ia-indexes -- --check
scripts.closeout:verify: npm run validate:dead-project-specs && npm run generate:ia-indexes -- --check
